utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) — complete; travel_dates (June 10–14, 2024) — specific; transportation — includes flight details and cost (€400); accommodation — includes hotel name, details, and cost (€500); activities — day-by-day list with costs; additional_services — includes extra services (insurance pre-authorization and restaurants); total_budget — includes cost breakdown and totals. All are fully detailed according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', which corresponds directly to the destinations list with rating 8. The activities include 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8), 'Oitavos Dunes Golf Day' (equivalent to 'Golf Day', rating 10), 'Cultural Tram Ride' (no exact match, closest category is cultural but not found in provided ratings, so exclude), 'Cascais Beach & Fine Dining' (Fine Dining Experience rated 10), and 'Final Brunch & Departure'—brunch aligns best with 'Brunch Café' from restaurants (rating 7). The additional services mention 'fine dining restaurants' (aligns with 'Fine Dining Experience', rating 10) and 'insurance_pre_authorization' (not rated in ground truth, so exclude). Hence, we map only the items that have a direct or clear analogous rating in the ground-truth dataset.
